series_metadata.series_title: Dual Public Employment Form for R.C. 102.04(D) Statement
series_metadata.series_description: The R.C. 102.04(D) Statement form is required to be completed by public employees who are employed by more than one public employer at the same time. This information is required by the R.C. 102.04(D).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain the electronic records in the Legal Division’s I drive for 4 years, and then destroy. ; Paper: Scan the paper documents, verify for quality assurance, and then destroy. Retain the electronic records in the Legal Division’s I drive for 4 years, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
